afterSnapshot.name: testComputeWindAlert

context.userMessage: Approved — build it, then run the tests and checks to verify.

rationale: Unit-test the pure threshold-comparison logic without network, covering both alert branches.
implementation: Calls computeWindAlert with a crafted current object for gusts above and below the threshold; asserts the alert flag, echoed gusts/threshold, and a non-empty message each time.
